scripts.d1:migrations:list: npx wrangler d1 migrations list DB --config wrangler.d1.toml --remote
scripts.d1:migrations:apply: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --config wrangler.d1.toml --remote
scripts.d1:migrations:list:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations list DB --config wrangler.d1.toml --local
scripts.d1:migrations:apply:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --config wrangler.d1.toml --local
scripts.d1:execute: npx wrangler d1 execute DB --config wrangler.d1.toml --remote
scripts.d1:execute:local: npx wrangler d1 execute DB --config wrangler.d1.toml --local
